results.title: Japanly AEO Grader - AI - HuntScreens
results.content:
By choosing Japanly AEO, global brands gain an independent, JP-focused tool to optimize their AI search presence in Japan. It solves the pain point of English-centric AEO tools by measuring honorific tone and citation structure across key LLMs. This empowers brands to improve how AI represents them, building confidence in their Japanese market strategy.

results.title: AEO Takes Steps to Strengthen Market Position in Japan
results.content:
With over 30 American Eagle stores and a digital business in Japan, AEO is committed to continued growth in the Japanese market.  The company is exploring options for its future business model and is taking steps to reposition its distribution channels to best serve customers. This includes accelerating growth of our intimates brand, Aerie across Japan, investing in the American Eagle experience with its award-winning new store concept, while putting a greater emphasis on growing digital.  We will also explore new channels of distribution and evaluate opportunities for new concepts, including the sneaker consignment brand, Urban Necessities.  The Omotesando and Ikebukuro locations will close, as we look to better position our business for future success. [...] AEO Facts:

 AEO is a highly profitably leading specialty retailer with consistent growth fueled by 17 consecutive quarters of positive comparable sales and $4 billion of annual revenues.
 The American Eagle brand is the #1 U.S. jeans brand for 15 to 25 year olds and continues to introduce exciting jeans innovation, including AirFlex and Ne(X)t Level Jeans.
 Aerie, a leading intimates brand, has emerged as one of the fastest growing new concepts with 18 straight quarters of double digit growth.

About American Eagle Outfitters, Inc. [...] Skip to content

AEO Media Report

# AEO Takes Steps to Strengthen Market Position in Japan

In News & Media,

PITTSBURGH —  American Eagle Outfitters, Inc. (NYSE: AEO) announced plans to strengthen its market position in Japan, which includes a mutual termination of the license agreement with Eagle Retailing Corporation, a partnership of Aoyama Corporation and Nippon Steel Trading Company, established in 2010.

results.title: A deeper alternative to HubSpot’s AEO Grader | Atomic
results.content:
## Why people look for Hubspot AEO Grader alternative?

AEO Grader is a one-time audit tool; you enter your brand details, get a report, and that's it. It doesn't track changes over time, alert you when visibility drops, or show you trend data. Atomic monitors your AI visibility continuously, so you see when something changes, not just how things stand at a single point in time.

AEO Grader gives you a brand visibility score across 3 AI engines, with sentiment analysis and competitive positioning. It doesn't connect those scores to real traffic or revenue, has no keyword tracking, no GSC or GA4 integration, and no technical audit. Atomic covers all of that alongside AI search tracking in one platform. [...] atomic logo

# A deeper alternative to HubSpot’s AEO Grader

HubSpot's AEO Grader gives you a one-time brand visibility snapshot across 3 AI engines. Atomic gives you continuous tracking across 10 engines, real traffic attribution, a technical LLM audit, and agents that act on what the data finds.

## Why people look for Hubspot AEO Grader alternative? [...] dropdown plus

HubSpot AEO Grader provides a one-time snapshot of AI visibility, while Atomic offers continuous tracking, deeper analysis, and automation. In short, AEO Grader shows where you stand, while Atomic helps you improve over time.

### Why do teams look for an AEO Grader alternative?

dropdown plus

Teams often need continuous monitoring and actionable insights, not just a one-time report. Without that, it’s difficult to track progress or respond to changes in visibility.

### Can a one-time AI visibility audit improve performance?

dropdown plus

Not on its own, improving visibility requires ongoing tracking, analysis, and optimization. Continuous data is key to understanding trends and making effective improvements.
